description: Product description Discover the Schwarzkopf Palette Liquid Keratin Intensive Colour Cream, available in 100 ml. This professional quality hair dye is designed to deliver deep, long-lasting color ranging from dark brown to black. It is enriched with liquid keratin, which nourishes and conditions the hair, restoring strength and shine. This dye is suitable for all hair types and provides permanent coverage. Easy to apply, ensures professional results at home. Use it for even colour and shine Directions 1. Apply color cream evenly to hair. 2. Leave on for a recommended time. 3. Rinse and condition hair.
